controlRecord.name: CR Consumer Loan Facility Instance Record
controlRecord.description: Fulfill any scheduled and ad-hoc obligations under a service arrangement, most typically for a financial product or facility within Consumer Loan.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the facility record.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanFacilityInstanceRecordIdentificationIssuerReference
attributes.description: Identifier issued by external registry or regulator.

attributes.name: CustomerReference
attributes.description: Reference to the account primary party/owner

attributes.name: PartyReference
attributes.description: The legal entity reference for the borrower, likely to be the same as customer

attributes.name: AssociationReference
attributes.description: Reference to the associated party

attributes.name: TaxReference
attributes.description: Reference to the identifier linking the account to appropriate tax handling

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanBorrowerAccountIdentification
attributes.description: The identifier of borrower account like Account Number.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanFacilityProductInstanceReference
attributes.description: Reference to the loan product instance

attributes.name: TotalConsumerLoanAmount
attributes.description: Total principal borrowed by the customer.

attributes.name: CalculatedConsumerLoanAmount
attributes.description:
The figure derived by applying formulas, modalities, or computation rules.
E.g. EMI, accrued interest, scheduled repayment amount.

attributes.name: ActualConsumerLoanAmount
attributes.description: The realized or posted figure — what is actually disbursed, received, or paid.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanCurrency
attributes.description: The currency for the loan account

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanPurpose
attributes.description: Purpose of loan.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanAgreementIdentification
attributes.description: The identifier of agreement like Agreement Number, Contract Number, Contract Registration Number, etc.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanAgreementTermandCondition
attributes.description: A Consumer Loan Agreement – Terms and Conditions is the legal contract between borrower and lender that sets out all binding obligations, rights, and disclosures

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanAgreementSignedDate
attributes.description: A characteristic of agreement which refers to 1) LifecycleDate of agreement (e.g., SignedDate, TerminatedDate, FulfilledDate) OR 2) ArrangedDate of agreement (e.g., StartingDate, EndingDate, ValidityPeriod, EffectiveDate).

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanAgreementValidityPeriod
attributes.description: Period during which the agreement is valid

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanAgreementStatus
attributes.description: A characteristic of agreement which refers to the LifecycleStatus of agreement (e.g., potential, offered, confirmed, completed, signed, terminated).

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanFacilityCollateralAllocationReference
attributes.description: The collateral value applied to the loan

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanFacilityCollateralReference
attributes.description: Reference to allocated collateral. Collateral are Assets used to secure the loan.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanType
attributes.description: The specific type of loan (e.g. term, revolving, evergreen)

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanOriginationDate
attributes.description: This is the date when the loan agreement is formally created and approved. It marks the point at which the lender and borrower enter into the contract, and the loan facility is established in the system

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanOpenDate
attributes.description: The official activation date of the loan arrangement, marking the start of its lifecycle in both legal and operational terms.This is the date when the loan terms actually begin to apply—often the date funds are disbursed or the borrower’s repayment obligations start

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanCloseDate
attributes.description: Date when the loan is fully settled or terminated.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanDuration
attributes.description: The period of time by which the amount must be repaid followed by either Days (D), Weeks(W), Months(M) or Years(Y)

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanMaturityDate
attributes.description: The date on which the committed loan amount is to be fully repaid based on Loan Duration and arrangement start date

attributes.name: OutstandingLoanBalance
attributes.description: The amount of a loan that has been disbursed but has not been repaid yet

attributes.name: NextRepaymentDate
attributes.description: Next Repayment Date is the upcoming scheduled calendar date on which the borrower must make their next repayment obligation under the loan arrangement.It is a dynamic attribute that shifts forward after each repayment is executed, ensuring continuity of the repayment lifecycle.

attributes.name: RepaymentAmount
attributes.description: The actual amount paid and processed in a repayment transaction executed by the borrower/cardholder. It represents the sum of all repayment components (principal, interest, fees, penalties, taxes) calculated according to the repayment type, method, frequency, and schedule.

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Charge Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Charge arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Charged service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of the charge record instance within the system.

attributes.name: ChargeInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Identifier assigned to a specific charge instance for tracking purposes.

attributes.name: ChargeType
attributes.description: Type of charge to be applied, e.g. Opening charge, Periodical charge, Early termination charge, etc.

attributes.name: ChargeRate
attributes.description: The rate or percentage applied to derive the charge amount

attributes.name: ChargeBearerReference
attributes.description: Reference to the party contractually responsible for settling the charge

attributes.name: ChargeDebitAccount
attributes.description: The rate or percentage applied to derive the charge amount

attributes.name: ChargeCreditAccount
attributes.description: Account to which the charge amount is credited

attributes.name: ChargeBaseAmount
attributes.description: Monetary value of the charge applied

attributes.name: AccrualChargeAmount
attributes.description: Accumulated charge amount over a defined accrual period

attributes.name: ChargeRecipientReference
attributes.description: Reference to the party entitled to receive the charge amount

attributes.name: ChargeCalculationMethod
attributes.description: Description of the logic or formula used to compute the charge

attributes.name: ChargeCalculationMethodType
attributes.description: Standardized classification of the calculation basis (e.g., flat, tiered, percentage)

attributes.name: ChargePaymentMethod
attributes.description: Description of the mechanism used to settle the charge

attributes.name: ChargePaymentMethodType
attributes.description: Standardized classification of the payment mechanism

attributes.name: ChargeApplicationFrequency
attributes.description: Frequency at which the charge is applied (e.g., monthly, annually)

attributes.name: ChargeBearerType
attributes.description: Specifies how the charge liability is distributed between involved parties

attributes.name: AccruedCreditDebitIndicator
attributes.description: Indicator specifying whether the accrued charge is a debit or credit entry

attributes.name: ChargeApplicationAmount
attributes.description: Amount applied during a specific charge event

attributes.name: ChargeApplicationCreditDebitIndicator
attributes.description: Indicator specifying whether the applied charge is a debit or credit

attributes.name: ChargeApplicationDate
attributes.description: Date and time at which the charge is applied

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Transaction Posting Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Transaction Posting arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Transaction Posting service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: TransactionPostingInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: AssociatedTransactionReference
attributes.description: Reference to the financial transaction being posted (e.g., TX-20250904-9876).

attributes.name: PostingArrangementType
attributes.description: Type of posting arrangement (real-time, batch, scheduled, end-of-day, manual, etc.).

attributes.name: PostingRequestDateandTime
attributes.description: Date and time the posting request was initiated.

attributes.name: PostingStatus
attributes.description: Current status (Initiated, Pending, Sent, Posted, Failed, Reversed, Cancelled).

attributes.name: PostingTrigger
attributes.description: Event that triggered posting (payment execution, standing order execution, fee assessment, interest accrual, etc.).

attributes.name: AccountingEventType
attributes.description: Business event requiring accounting treatment (customer payment debit, account credit, fee charge, interest payment, etc.).

attributes.name: PostingAmount
attributes.description: Amount to be posted.
attributes.relatedBusinessObjectAttrName: Financial Accounting Transaction Amount and Currency

attributes.name: Date
attributes.description: Date the underlying business event occurred.

attributes.name: EntryPostingPriority
attributes.description: Priority level for processing (Normal, Urgent, Regulatory).

attributes.name: DebitAccountingReference
attributes.description: Reference to the debit accounting instruction/account to be used.

attributes.name: CreditAccountingReference
attributes.description: Reference to the credit accounting instruction/account to be used.

attributes.name: AccountingInstructionReference
attributes.description: Identifier of the instruction sent to the Account Facility SD.

attributes.name: LedgerPostingReference
attributes.description: Reference returned by the accounting system after successful posting.

attributes.name: PostingDate
attributes.description: Date when the transaction is posted to the ledger (determines accounting period).

attributes.name: PostingFailureReason
attributes.description: Reason code if posting fails or is rejected.

attributes.name: EntryReconciliationStatus
attributes.description: Indicates whether operational transaction and accounting posting have been reconciled.

attributes.name: PostingExtractDetails
attributes.description: Structured accounting data extracted for delivery to the accounting system.

attributes.name: PostingChannel
attributes.description: Source of the posting request (Payment, Standing Order, ATM, Card Transaction, etc.).

attributes.name: TransactionPostingRecord
attributes.description: Complete record/history of posting actions and status changes.

attributes.name: AuthorizationStatus
attributes.description: Approval status of the posting.

attributes.name: BalanceBeforePosting
attributes.description: Account balance before posting.

attributes.name: BalanceAfterPosting
attributes.description: Account balance after posting.

attributes.name: PostingDebitCreditIndicator
attributes.description: Indicates whether the posting is a debit or credit.
attributes.relatedBusinessObjectAttrName: Financial Accounting Transaction Debit Credit Indicator

attributes.name: PostingSequenceNumber
attributes.description: Sequence number used to maintain posting order.

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Collateral Allocation Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Collateral Allocation arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Collateral Allocation service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: CollateralAllocationInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: CustomerReference
attributes.description: Reference to the customer or entity that receives credit facilities and provides collateral to secure one or more financial obligations.

attributes.name: SourceAccountIdentification
attributes.description: The bank account number (or IBAN) of the customer from which funds or exposure coverage are referenced for the purpose of allocating collateral to secure one or more obligations.

attributes.name: BankReference
attributes.description: Reference to the institution that grants credit and receives collateral as security to mitigate credit risk exposure.

attributes.name: CustomerName
attributes.description: Name of Customer

attributes.name: CollateralAssetReference
attributes.description: Reference to collateral asset

attributes.name: CollateralValuationReference
attributes.description: Reference to approved valuation

attributes.name: ExecutedCollateralAllocationAmount
attributes.description: Amount actually allocated

attributes.name: CollateralAllocationExecutionDate
attributes.description: Date allocation was executed

attributes.name: CollateralAllocationStatus
attributes.description: Current state of Collateral Allocation Lifecycle

attributes.name: CollateralAllocationStartDate
attributes.description: Date when collateral allocation becomes effective.

attributes.name: CollateralType
attributes.description: A Collateral Type is a classification that identifies the nature or category of an asset pledged as security to support a financial obligation (such as a loan, credit facility, or derivative exposure). It defines what kind of asset is being used as collateral and determines how it is valued, managed, and treated in risk and legal processes.

attributes.name: CollateralAllocationType
attributes.description: Allocation Type defines how the value of a collateral asset is assigned to one or more secured obligations (such as loans, credit lines, or exposures).

attributes.name: CollateralAllocationMethod
attributes.description: Method used to allocate the collateral asset

attributes.name: CollateralAllocationEndDate
attributes.description: Date when allocation is released or terminated.

attributes.name: RemainingAvailableCollateral
attributes.description: Remaining unallocated collateral

attributes.name: EncumberedAmount
attributes.description: Collateral currently reserved against exposure

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Amount Block Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Amount Block arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Amount Block service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: AmountBlockInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: CustomerReference
attributes.description: Reference to the customer who owns the account where the money is blocked.

attributes.name: BankReference
attributes.description: Reference to the bank that applies and manages the money block.

attributes.name: AmountBlockType
attributes.description: The general category of a block applied to funds in an account, indicating the overall purpose or nature of the restriction

attributes.name: AmountBlockReason
attributes.description: Reason for placing the block (e.g., card transaction, loan security).

attributes.name: ExecutedBlockAmount
attributes.description: Current reserved amount

attributes.name: AmountBlockStatus
attributes.description: Current state of Amount Block Lifecycle

attributes.name: AmountBlockStartDate
attributes.description: Date when the block becomes effective.

attributes.name: AmountBlockEndDate
attributes.description: Date the block is scheduled to end

attributes.name: SourceAccountIdentification
attributes.description: The bank account number (or IBAN) of the customer where amount will be blocked.

attributes.name: CustomerName
attributes.description: The name of the customer

attributes.name: AmountBlockScopeType
attributes.description: Defines how much of the funds are restricted and how broadly the block applies.

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Interest Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Interest arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Interest service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Reference to <CR>

attributes.name: InterestInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Reference to Interest

attributes.name: InterestRate
attributes.description: The rate used to calculate interest, either as a fixed value or derived from a base rate plus a margin.

attributes.name: InterestType
attributes.description: The type of interest (to be applied or applied)

attributes.name: InterestStatus
attributes.description: Represents the stage of the billing process/lifecycle.

attributes.name: InterestAccrualMethodType
attributes.description: Identifies the computation method of accrued interest of the related financial instrument. (ISO20022)

attributes.name: CustomerReference
attributes.description: Reference to the customer to whom the interest relates, either as the recipient (for earned interest) or the payer (for charged interest).

attributes.name: SourceAccountIdentification
attributes.description: The bank account number (or IBAN) of the customer account on which the interest is calculated, applied, or settled.

attributes.name: CustomerName
attributes.description: The name of the individual or entity that owns the account associated with the interest.

attributes.name: BankReference
attributes.description: Reference to the financial institution servicing the customer account and responsible for calculating, applying, or processing the interest.

attributes.name: InterestBaseAmount
attributes.description: The underlying amount on which interest is calculated.

attributes.name: ExecutedInterestAmount
attributes.description:
Amount of money representing interest payments. (ISO20022)

Comment:
Interest amount posted to the account or invoice

attributes.name: AccruedInterestAmount
attributes.description: Interest accumulated but not yet applied.

attributes.name: InterestCalculationMethodType
attributes.description: Method used to compute interest (simple, compound).

attributes.name: InterestPaymentFrequency
attributes.description: Specifies the frequency of an interest payment. (ISO20022)

attributes.name: InterestPaymentSchedule
attributes.description: Interest payment schedule is a plan that defines when interest is calculated and paid, at what rate, and for which periods.

attributes.name: OutstandingInterestAmount
attributes.description: Remaining unpaid interest amount

attributes.name: PaidInterestAmount
attributes.description: Interest mount already settled

attributes.name: InterestPaymentDate
attributes.description: Date interest is actually paid to or collected from the customer.

attributes.name: InterestAccrualPeriod
attributes.description: Time period over which interest is earned

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Disbursement Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Disbursement arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Disbursement service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: DisbursementInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: DisbursementEntitledPartyReference
attributes.description: Identifier of the party entitled to receive disbursement (borrower, guarantor, or designated beneficiary).

attributes.name: DisbursementIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the disbursement transaction, ensuring traceability across lifecycle.

attributes.name: LoanArrangementReference
attributes.description: Parallel to Facility Instance Record linkage. Connects the disbursement back to the loan facility record, ensuring governance traceability.

attributes.name: DisbursementType
attributes.description: Specifies whether disbursement is full, progressive, or conditional.

attributes.name: DisbursementPercentage
attributes.description: Percentage of sanctioned amount released (e.g., 20% tranche).

attributes.name: DisbursementCurrency
attributes.description: Currency in which disbursement is denominated and executed.

attributes.name: LoanDisbursementExpectedDate
attributes.description: Planned or scheduled date for disbursement as per facility terms; distinct from actual execution date.

attributes.name: DisbursementAccountIdentification
attributes.description: Account to be credited with the proceeds of the loan, also known as Borrower Account ID, Beneficiary Account, Credit Account, or Loan Proceeds Account depending on context.

attributes.name: DisbursementMethod
attributes.description: Mode of transfer (NEFT, RTGS, cheque, DD).

attributes.name: ClearingChannel
attributes.description: Clearing system used (e.g., RBI RTGS, NPCI).

attributes.name: ProcessingValidityTime
attributes.description: The start and end time (or duration) within which the disbursement must be processed.

attributes.name: DisbursementAmount
attributes.description: Actual amount instructed or intended to be released to the borrower under the loan facility.

attributes.name: GrossDisbursement
attributes.description: Total disbursement amount before deductions.

attributes.name: NetDisbursement
attributes.description: Amount credited after deductions/charges.

attributes.name: LCYDisbursementAmount
attributes.description: Local currency equivalent of disbursement.

attributes.name: DisbursementDate
attributes.description: Date on which disbursement is executed.

attributes.name: DisbursementValueDate
attributes.description: Settlement date for funds transfer.

attributes.name: DisbursementStatus
attributes.description: Current state (Pending, Executed, Failed, Reversed).

attributes.name: OutstandingBalancePost-Disbursement
attributes.description: Updated exposure after disbursement execution.

attributes.name: ExecutedAmount
attributes.description: The amount actually processed and credited/debited after execution

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Repayment Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Repayment arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Repayment service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Reference to <CR>

attributes.name: RepaymentInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Reference to Repayment

attributes.name: LenderReference
attributes.description: The financial institution or entity that provided the loan or credit and receives the repayment.

attributes.name: BorrowerReference
attributes.description: Primary party obligated to repay loan principal, interest, fees, or charges under agreed terms.

attributes.name: RepaymentFrequency
attributes.description: Interval between repayment obligations (monthly, quarterly, annually, etc.)

attributes.name: RepaymentPeriod
attributes.description: The repayment period, also known as the loan term or tenure, is the duration over which a borrower is required to make payments to fully repay a loan, including both the principal and interest.This period is agreed upon with the lender and dictates the schedule and amount of required payments

attributes.name: RepaymentComponents
attributes.description: The contractual structure of how repayments are split (principal, interest, fees, penalties).Repayment Components are the building blocks of a repayment obligation under a loan or credit facility. They break down each installment into principal, interest, fees, and charges,

attributes.name: RepaymentDueDate
attributes.description: Repayment Due Date is the specific calendar date on which a borrowers repayment obligation must be fulfilled under a loan or credit facility

attributes.name: BeneficiaryAccountIdentification
attributes.description: The destination account information included in a repayment instruction, defining where the repayment amount must be credited.

attributes.name: RepaymentAmount
attributes.description: The actual amount paid and processed in a repayment transaction executed by the borrower/cardholder. It represents the sum of all repayment components (principal, interest, fees, penalties, taxes) calculated according to the repayment type, method, frequency, and schedule.

attributes.name: OutstandingRepaymentAmount
attributes.description: Outstanding Repayment Amount is the remaining balance that the borrower still owes under a loan or credit facility after accounting for all repayments made to date. It represents the unpaid portion of principal, accrued interest, fees, and charges that are yet to be settled.

attributes.name: LastRepaymentDate
attributes.description: The terminal due date in the repayment schedule when the borrowers final installment (principal, interest, fees, or charges) is payable.It marks the end of the repayment lifecycle and is derived from the First Repayment Date, Repayment Frequency, and Repayment Period.

attributes.name: NextRepaymentDate
attributes.description: Next Repayment Date is the upcoming scheduled calendar date on which the borrower must make their next repayment obligation under the loan arrangement.It is a dynamic attribute that shifts forward after each repayment is executed, ensuring continuity of the repayment lifecycle.

attributes.name: RepaymentType
attributes.description:
Repayment type refers to the classification of how a loan or credit facility is repaid-whether through fixed installments, bullet payments, balloon structures, or revolving arrangements. 

In ISO 20022, repayment type is a structured attribute that complements repayment method, ensuring clarity in financial messaging and compliance across institutions.

attributes.name: RepaymentSchedule
attributes.description: A repayment schedule, also known as an amortization schedule, details the number of payments required to fully repay a loan, the frequency of these payments, and the breakdown of principal and interest paid with each installment. It translates the rules (method, modality, frequency) into a calendar of dated payment events that the borrower must fulfill.

attributes.name: RepaymentMethod
attributes.description: A repayment method is the rule that defines how interest is treated in a loan or credit arrangement. It specifies whether interest is simply accrued and remains due, or whether unpaid interest is added to the principal (capitalized),

behaviourQualifiers.name: BQ Status Tracking Instance Record
behaviourQualifiers.description: Contains all details of the Status Tracking arrangements, the instructional content of invoked Status Tracking service requests and where applicable details of the outcome of that request.

attributes.name: ConsumerLoanFacilityInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a control record instance

attributes.name: StatusTrackingInstanceRecordIdentification
attributes.description: Unique identifier of a behavior qualifier instance

attributes.name: StatusTrackingType
attributes.description: Classifies the category of status being monitored or maintained for the subject entity. Defines the business context of the tracking activity such as lifecycle, balance, workflow progression, limit utilization, settlement, fulfillment, compliance, or exception status.

attributes.name: Status
attributes.description: Represents the current state, condition, or standing of the tracked entity within the specified tracking type. Expresses the latest recognized business or operational status value.

attributes.name: StatusReason
attributes.description: Specifies the business rationale, event, rule, condition, or triggering circumstance that caused the current status to be assigned, changed, suspended, escalated, or terminated.

attributes.name: StatusDateandTime
attributes.description: Indicates the date and time at which the status became effective, was recorded, or was last updated within the tracking process.

attributes.name: StatusOrigin
attributes.description: Identifies the originating source, process, system, channel, service operation, event stream, or organizational party responsible for generating or updating the status.

attributes.name: StatusSequence
attributes.description: Defines the relative ordering, progression index, or chronological position of the status within a lifecycle, workflow, state transition chain, or event history.

attributes.name: StatusThreshold
attributes.description: Specifies a reference limit, tolerance, trigger point, boundary condition, or evaluation criterion used to determine status transitions, alerts, escalations, or exception conditions.

attributes.name: StatusValue
attributes.description: Captures the measurable, calculated, observed, or evaluated value associated with the tracked status condition. Typically used for quantitative tracking such as balances, amounts, utilization percentages, durations, or counts.

attributes.name: StatusUnit
attributes.description: Defines the unit of measure, denomination, scale, or representation applicable to the associated status value, such as currency, percentage, quantity, duration, or measurement unit.

attributes.name: EffectivePeriod
attributes.description: Defines the time interval during which the status is considered valid, applicable, enforceable, or operationally active for business processing or reporting purposes.
